case_title: WAIGI COLLINS VS. STATES TITLE INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLINS, WAIGI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STATES TITLE INC. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLINS, WAIGI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2021 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-27-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-27-2021 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF WAIGI COLLINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATES TITLE INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KAREN SALCEDO, ASSOCIATE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT STIPULATES TO JPT. DEFENDANT AND PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JASON JUNGREIS CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY COLLINS, WAIGI AS TO DEFENDANT STATES TITLE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF COLLINS, WAIGI
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT STATES TITLE INC.
STIPULATION FOR JPT FILED BY COLLINS, WAIGI STATES TITLE INC.
